$canonical: NEW canonical for animation timing. No motion token layer exists in code today — durations/easings are magic numbers scattered across ~30 files (ADR-012). This file proposes the token set to migrate to; values are the DISTINCT durations actually observed, grouped into a scale. Adopt via .claude/rules/motion.md.

duration.$note: 300ms is the de-facto default (res/anim/*, dimens animation_duration, const ANIMATION_DURATION_MS). 250/160/360 also appear and should map to the nearest step or be justified.

reducedMotion.$status: ABSENT — no code checks Settings.Global.ANIMATOR_DURATION_SCALE or accessibility reduce-motion anywhere.
reducedMotion.$rule: MANDATORY: honor reduced-motion (fall back to duration.instant / cross-fade). Gate in .claude/rules/motion.md.

$duplicatedConstants: ANIM_DEFAULT_DURATION=1000L copy-pasted in LoginFragment.kt:63 and LoginFragmentV2.kt:74
dimens.xml animation_duration=300 (a duration stored as a dimen)
